overview: ModForge is a full-featured mod creation, management, and sharing platform for any open world game — mobile (Minecraft PE), PC, and console (Xbox, PlayStation, Nintendo Switch). Users build mods via a Config Builder, Script Editor, or file upload, with optional media for characters, dialogues, and skits. Features include a My Games Library, Open With flow, platform/system tagging and filtering, character cards, culture/group system, and full console browser compatibility.
features: Mod creation via Config Builder, Script Editor, or file upload
Character/NPC profiles with optional photos, roles, abilities, and backstory
Culture/group system — define groups with names and languages, assign NPCs
My Games Library — add owned games (mobile, PC, console) and tag mods to them
Open With dialog — after download, select which game to apply the mod to
Platform/system tagging and filtering — Xbox, PlayStation, PC, Switch, Android, iOS
Public mod library with search and system/game filters
Mod toggle on/off from any device including consoles via browser (Edge on Xbox)
Responsive design for mobile, tablet, desktop, and TV screens
User profiles with character cards (optional photo, role, abilities, backstory)
